name: Beginner Foundations
description: Perfect for complete beginners. Learn proper grip, stance, and basic strokes in a supportive environment. No experience necessary.

name: Intermediate Match Play
description: Competitive drills and match play for intermediate players. Focus on strategy, consistency, and point construction.

name: Advanced Performance
description: High-intensity training for tournament players. Advanced tactics, shot selection, and mental game development.

name: Weekend Warriors
description: Recreational group for intermediate players who want to improve while having fun. Friendly atmosphere, mixed drills and games.

name: Junior Development
description: For young players ages 8-14. Build fundamentals through games and age-appropriate drills. Emphasis on sportsmanship and fun.

name: Private Lesson - Elite
description: One-on-one instruction with our top coach. Customized training plan, video analysis, and personalized feedback.

name: Ladies Doubles Clinic
description: Doubles-focused training for women. Court positioning, communication, net play, and team strategies.

name: Serve & Volley Mastery
description: Specialized clinic focusing on serve technique, approach shots, and net play. Aggressive baseline-to-net transitions.

name: Early Morning Fitness
description: Start your day with tennis drills and fitness exercises. Perfect for beginners looking to improve conditioning and basic skills.

name: Sunday Social Tennis
description: Casual round-robin play for all skill levels. Meet other tennis enthusiasts, play different partners, and enjoy the game.
